# Cozy UI Reference

Quick reference for cozy-ui: React components built on Material-UI v4 and CSS utility classes for building Cozy apps.

## Overview

| Category | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| **Components** | 85+ React components (Buttons, Layout, Forms, etc.) |
| **CSS Classes** | Utility classes for spacing, typography, colors |
| **Theming** | Light/dark theme support via CozyTheme |
| **Icons** | Cozy icon sprites and Material-UI icons |

## Quick Reference

### Import Components

```js
import { Button, Alert, Modal } from 'cozy-ui/transpiled/react'
import styles from 'cozy-ui/transpiled/react/styles'
```

### Import CSS Utilities

```stylus
@import 'cozy-ui/dist/cozy-ui.min.css'
// OR in Stylus
@import 'cozy-ui/stylus/settings'
```

### Theme Provider

```jsx
import { CozyTheme } from 'cozy-ui/transpiled/react/providers/CozyTheme'

<CozyTheme variant="light">
  <App />
</CozyTheme>
// variants: light, dark
```

## File Structure

```
skill/
  SKILL.md        # This overview
  components.md   # Full component reference with props
  css-classes.md  # CSS utility class reference
```
